searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Free-text input that specifies what the user wants to search for.
searchQuery.einstein:description: Free-text string containing what the user wants to search for.

searchProvider.title: Search Provider
searchProvider.description: The search provider used for web searches.
searchProvider.einstein:description: The search provider used for web searches. This can only be configured by admin.

siteFilter.title: Allowed Domains
siteFilter.description: A comma-separated list of up to 10 allowed domains to filter web search results.
siteFilter.einstein:description: A comma-separated list of up to 10 allowed domains to filter web search results. This can only be configured by admin.
